    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'> 3</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:39</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - AWS billing issue is fixed now. </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'> 3</var>, <var data-var='time'>14:09</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - Customer using AWS billing may experience availability issues.<br />Exact reason is being investigated. </p></content>
